subject: (no subject)
body:
hope you had fun,, I am glad to have you as my friend,, you are the only person I have met who is as crazy as me.   I have the three largest private equity people in the states,, excited about visiting dubai,,, also vanity fair editors would love to do a story,, of your choosing,,  1 can i get the plans for you spa,, i'd love to see it,, 2, boat plans,, 3, can we go to turkey either april 11-14 or 18-21


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
